name: JCV_LT_st_splice_paralogs
description: JCV early region produces multiple proteins from alternative splicing of one pre-mRNA: large T antigen (LT, full-length, contains J-domain, ori-binding domain, helicase, p53/RB binding), small t antigen (st, shares N-terminal J-domain with LT, has PP2A-binding C-terminus, lacks helicase). JCV and BKV additionally express T' (T-prime) isoforms (T'135, T'136, T'165) from alternative splice acceptors. MCV produces a tumour-truncated LT in MCC plus a 57kT-like product. Reads spanning splice junctions are isoform-discriminating; intronic reads only map to the unspliced LT track.
expected_copy_count: 1 early-region locus per genome with multiple spliced isoforms
